title: MCMOD-TestPack
description:
Make wiki great again.
Easier get to mod's items/blocks information to write mod wiki.
body:
This modpack is to make wiki great again.

The modpack was made in order to reach the target by using enough info mods.

To edit mod items, you need to find them in the game, and then test the attributes, usage and damage. This is a very troublesome thing. Of course, it's more difficult to find the code.

This modpack has most tools to solve the problems.

All of them are woking for us to show more information of other mods.

Using Isometric Renders  can get rendered view of entity and structure.
